description_long: This object consists of a series of rectangular, vertically oriented panels arranged in a loose, semi-circular or oval configuration, resembling a set of open shelving units or partitioned cabinets. Each panel is flat and featureless, with no visible handles, doors, or decorative elements, and they are spaced apart to create open gaps between them. The panels appear to be made from a uniform, solid material with a smooth, matte finish, likely painted or coated in a light gray color. The structure is modular and open, lacking any enclosed compartments or shelving surfaces, which suggests it may function as a modern, minimalist room divider or display unit. The overall design is geometric and abstract, with clean lines and right angles dominating the form. There are no visible fasteners, hinges, or glass elements, and the object appears to be freestanding.
description: A set of flat, rectangular gray panels arranged in a semi-circular, open configuration, resembling minimalist shelving or partition units. The design is modern, modular, and featureless, with a smooth matte finish.
description_view_0: Multiple flat panels are visible, arranged in a semi-circular arc with open gaps between them.
description_view_1: The staggered arrangement of the panels is more apparent, showing the depth and spacing between each unit.
description_view_2: The open, modular nature of the structure is clear, with each panel standing independently and no visible connectors.
description_view_3: The panels are seen from the opposite side, emphasizing the uniformity and lack of doors or handles.
